subject: M&A Target Analysis - DataSync Corp
body:
Confidential - M&A Committee Only

I've completed the preliminary analysis of DataSync Corp as a potential acquisition target.

Financial Summary:
- Revenue: $18M ARR (growing 35% YoY)
- Gross Margin: 72%
- EBITDA: -$2.1M (expected to turn positive in 18 months)
- Customer count: 340 (avg contract value $53K)
- Net retention rate: 118%

Valuation Analysis:
- Comparable transactions suggest 12-15x revenue multiple
- DCF analysis yields enterprise value of $195M-$240M
- Recommended offer range: $200M-$220M

Strategic Rationale:
- Fills our data integration gap
- 60% customer overlap presents cross-sell opportunity
- Engineering team of 45 in Zurich (strong talent market)

Next steps: Should we engage our investment bankers to initiate discussions?
